zh.lifeSummary: 當Lord Thomas Waldron於1510年出生在英國英格蘭波克夏藍布時，他的父親Richard Waldron39歲，母親Ann Davenport50歲。他於大約1534年與Maryan Woldron在英國波克夏藍布結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1617年10月30日在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾享年107歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lord Thomas Waldron于1510年出生在英国英格兰波克夏藍布时，他的父亲Richard Waldron39岁，母亲Ann Davenport50岁。他于大约1534年与Maryan Woldron在英国波克夏藍布结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1617年10月30日在英国英格兰林可爾史爾享年107岁。

nameMeanings.name: Waldron
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Irish (Mayo): from the Norman personal name Waleran, Galeran (ancient Germanic Walahram, Old French Galeran(t)), composed of the ancient Germanic elements walh ‘foreigner’ + hrafn ‘raven’. Compare Walraven . In Ireland, where it is common, this name was Gaelicized early as Mac Bhalronta, also later as Mac Bhaildrin and de Bhaldraithe.
English: habitational name from a place in Sussex named Waldron. The placename derives from Old English wald ‘woodland’ + ærn ‘building’.

History: This is the name of a prominent NH family, established there since the 17th century. Richard Walderne (born c. 1615) came to New England from Alchester, Warwickshire, England, c. 1640 and settled at Dover, NH.

variants.name: Walraven
meanings: German and Dutch: from Walravan, a personal name composed of the elements wal ‘battlefield’ + hraban ‘raven’. The personal name was popular among knights and patricians of the Lower Rhine and Upper Swabian region, where the surname is still common. This surname is also found in England.

variants.name: Walrond
meanings: English (Somerset and Devon): of Normin origin, a variant of   Waldron  .

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

en.lifeSummary: When Lord Thomas Waldron was born in 1510, in Lambourn, Berkshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Richard Waldron, was 39 and his mother, Ann Davenport, was 50. He married Maryan Woldron about 1534, in Lambourn, Berkshire, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 1 daughter. He died on 30 October 1617, in Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 107.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lord Thomas Waldron est né en 1510, à Lambourn, Berkshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Richard Waldron, avait 39 ans et sa mère, Ann Davenport, avait 50 ans. Il a épousé Maryan Woldron environ 1534, à Lambourn, Berkshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 30 octobre 1617, à Lincolnshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 107 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: Lord Thomas Waldronが1510年にイギリスイギリスバークシュアイアランボウルンで生まれた時，父Richard Waldronは39歳，母Ann Davenportは50歳であった。約1534年にイギリスバークシュアイアランボウルンでMaryan Woldronと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1617年10月30日にイギリスイギリスリンコルンシュアイアで107歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Lord Thomas Waldron(이)가 1510년 영국 잉글랜드 버크실르 램우른에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Richard Waldron(은)는 39세였고, 그의 어머니 Ann Davenport(은)는 50세였다. 그는 대략 1534년 영국 버크실르 램우른에서 Maryan Woldron(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1617년 10월 30일 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르에서 107세의 나이로 사망했다.

Ele casou-se com Maryan Woldron aproximadamente 1534, em Lambourn, Berkshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 30 de outubro de 1617, em Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 107 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lord Thomas Waldron родился в 1510 г. в местности лэмбурн, биркшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Richard Waldron было 39 лет, а матери, которую звали Ann Davenport, 50. Он женился на женщине по имени Maryan Woldron около 1534 г. в местности лэмбурн, биркшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер 30 октября 1617 г. в местности линколншир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 107 лет.
